headline: State Street Corporation (STT) Could Be a Great Choice
summary: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does State Street (STT) have what it takes? Let's find out.

headline: State Street Extends ETF Role While Adding Cybersecurity Expertise To Board
summary: State Street (NYSE:STT) has been appointed service provider for Dimensional Fund Advisors' first U.S. ETF share class structure. The company also announced the election of Susan Gordon, a former senior U.S. intelligence and cybersecurity official, to its Board of Directors. For you as an investor, these moves sit at the intersection of product infrastructure and boardroom oversight, two areas that matter for large custody and asset servicing firms. headline: Assessing State Street (STT) Valuation After Mixed Short And Long Term Shareholder Returns
summary: What State Street’s Recent Returns Tell You Right Now State Street (STT) has been on investors’ radar after a mixed stretch, with the stock showing a 2.5% gain over the past week but a 4.5% decline over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for State Street. At a share price of $126.28, State Street’s recent strength in 1-day and 7-day share price returns contrasts with weaker 3-month performance. The 1-year and 3-year total shareholder returns above 40% and 80% respectively indicate...
